case_title: LUCCHESI, DAVID vs. RIELOFF, JUANITA DBA MASS MEDIA et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT RIELOFF, JUANITA DBA MASS MEDIA
